# Frontaliere Ticino (English)

> Frontaliere Ticino is a comprehensive free web application for cross-border workers ("frontalieri") commuting between Italy and Switzerland, covering Cantons Ticino, Graubünden, and Valais. It provides fiscal simulation tools, pension planning, health insurance comparison, currency exchange calculators, transport cost tools, job board, and practical guides.

## Site Identity

- **URL**: https://frontaliereticino.ch/en/
- **Name**: Frontaliere Ticino
- **Language**: English (this file) — also available in Italian (primary), German, French
- **Type**: Free web application, no registration required
- **Last Updated**: June 2026
- **Audience**: English-speaking cross-border workers commuting between Italy and Switzerland (Ticino, Graubünden, Valais)
- **Content Authority**: Original, factual content based on official Swiss and Italian tax regulations, BFS/UST statistics, and UFSP/BAG health insurance data

## Alternate Language Versions

- Italian (primary): [/llms.txt](https://frontaliereticino.ch/llms.txt)
- German: [/de/llms.txt](https://frontaliereticino.ch/de/llms.txt)
- French: [/fr/llms.txt](https://frontaliereticino.ch/fr/llms.txt)
- Full domain knowledge (Italian): [/llms-full.txt](https://frontaliereticino.ch/llms-full.txt)
- Sitemap: [/sitemap.xml](https://frontaliereticino.ch/sitemap.xml)
